summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 6 features: Kas Kecil (Petty Cash) and Bank Transfer modules with GL auto-posting. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: Login with admin@garment.com successful
GET /api/finance/petty-cash/funds - List funds (200 OK)
POST /api/finance/petty-cash/funds - Create fund with opening balance Rp 1,000,000 (200 OK)
POST /api/finance/petty-cash/transactions - Create expense Rp 150,000 with GL auto-posting (JE-20260601-0005)
POST /api/finance/petty-cash/funds/{id}/replenish - Replenish Rp 500,000 with GL posting (JE-20260601-0006)
GET /api/finance/petty-cash/transactions - List transactions (3 found, all GL posted)
GET /api/finance/bank-transfers - List transfers (200 OK)
POST /api/finance/bank-transfers - Create transfer BCA → Mandiri Rp 5,000,000 with GL auto-posting (JE-20260601-0007)
Finance Portal navigation working correctly
Kas & Pembayaran tab accessible and functional
Kas Kecil module loads with fund cards and transaction history
Transfer Bank module loads with transfer table
All GL status badges showing 'Posted' with JE numbers
Create fund dialog opens and closes correctly
Create transaction dialog opens and closes correctly
Create transfer dialog opens and closes correctly
Fund cards display correctly with balance indicators
Transaction table shows GL posting status correctly
Transfer table shows GL posting status with JE numbers
No unposted transactions (all GL auto-posting successful)

tests.name: GET /api/finance/petty-cash/transactions
tests.result: Found 3 transactions, all GL posted (0 unposted)

tests.name: POST /api/finance/bank-transfers
tests.result: Transfer created BT-20260601-0002, BCA → Mandiri Rp 5,000,000, GL posted: JE-20260601-0007

tests.name: Kas Kecil module loads correctly
tests.details: Found 2 fund cards, 'Buat Dana Baru' button present

tests.name: Transfer Bank module loads correctly
tests.details: Found 2 transfer records in table, 'Transfer Baru' button present

tests.name: GL status badges display correctly
tests.details: All transactions show 'Posted' status with JE numbers

notes: GL auto-posting functioning as expected for both Petty Cash and Bank Transfer
Navigation structure: Finance Portal > Kas & Pembayaran tab > Kas Kecil / Transfer Bank
All transactions showing 'Posted' status with JE numbers
UI components rendering correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Fund cards display balance with visual indicators
Transaction and transfer tables show complete information including GL status
